known_caveats: Chained Volume Measure at 2023 reference prices. Seasonally adjusted. 2025 is latest full year; 2026 Q1 available as provisional quarterly. IHXW was previously in PN2 dataset.

indicator_name: Real net domestic product per head
known_caveats: CVM 2023 reference prices. Seasonally adjusted. NDP = GDP minus capital consumption (depreciation). Series starts 1998. Grew at less than half the rate of GDP per head.
Index 2023=100. Whole economy output per hour worked. Seasonally adjusted. Quarterly data available; annual values used for baseline comparison. CDID LZVB within PRDY dataset.

Index UK=100. Output per hour by ITL1 region (12 regions). Latest available is 2023 (published June 2025). Regional data typically lags national by 1–2 years. UK=100 is the baseline; England excluded from regional comparison.

Computed indicator: nominal AWE (KAB9, whole economy total pay SA) deflated by CPI all-items index (D7BT, 2015=100). Both series are annual observations; monthly data available. Supplementary source for CPI: https://www.ons.gov.uk/generator?uri=/economy/inflationandpriceindices/timeseries/d7bt/mm23&format=csv

Ratio of median house price to median gross annual workplace-based earnings. England and Wales only (not UK). Peaked at 8.95 in 2021. 2007=7.17 2025=7.55. Five-year average 8.19 confirms sustained affordability pressure.

Total incomplete RTT pathways (waiting list). Aug 2007 = first data point (4.19M). Mar 2026 = 7.01M (+67.5%). Post-COVID backlog drove surge. Data compiled from NHS England annual time series and monthly releases.
